home.scienceBased_p1: All our technologies and models are based on scientific literature i.e. experimented and field-validated.
home.scienceBased_p2: With strong literature reviews and financed field studies (up to 13k).
home.eliteExigence_p1: Race briefing of elite athletes (Ruth Croft, Tom Evans, Petter Engdhal...).
home.eliteExigence_p2: From world best athletes to your hands! Minutious work must benefit to everyone.
home.communication_p1: An expertise shared to sponsors and mass audience: make data readable and accessible.
home.communication_p2: Technical studies and race statistics over many worldwide events.
home.joseph_role: Founder of Enduraw and Performance Scientist
home.joseph_p1: From his bedroom in Chamonix, Joseph spent night to build the perfect pacing plans by analyzing race profile and environmental conditions.
home.joseph_p2: As an athlete, he dedicated his Master Thesis to optimization of performance in endurance sport.
home.joseph_p3: Team Manager at Nutripure, he works with multiple elite athletes with a deep conviction: mathematics are they keys to reach the latest percents of performance.
home.anthony_p1: Deeply interested in training sciences, trickling down problematics as physiology, nutrition and psychology, Anthony is quite inquisive.
home.anthony_p2: With a Ph.D in physics, he plays with the data to guide athletes to their goals and light up many insights on running through many angles!
home.justine_p1: After studying sports management in Grenoble, Justine joined the team in work-study contract with the Win Sport School.
home.justine_p2: Justine thrives in content creation. Her curiosity leads her to share on very different subjects, races statistics or athletes palmares on Instagram.
home.valentin_p1: Studying Data Sciences, Valentin is deeply involved in his training in Parisian woods, looking for elevation gain!
home.valentin_p2: Focusing on environmental factors, he deals with their influence on the performance for mass runners and help them how to deal with them.
home.thibaut_p1: Currently completing a STAPS work-study program, he brings his expertise in physiological testing, training methodologies, and endurance performance.
home.thibaut_p2: With a strong background as an experienced runner, he combines field knowledge with a deep passion for scientific research.
home.thibaut_p3: His analytical mindset and coaching experience allow him to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for athletes.
home.charline_p1: With a background as a nutrition engineer, she brings strong expertise in sports nutrition and energy optimization during effort.
home.charline_p2: At Enduraw, she contributes to the design and modeling of performance-driven algorithms, combining scientific rigor with technical skills.
home.charline_p3: Her analytical approach and passion for data allow her to transform complex physiological insights into smart, actionable tools for athletes.
home.antoine_p1: Belgian and passionate about performance analysis, he brings valuable experience from his time at Tudor Cycling.
home.antoine_p2: Specialized in data modeling, he transforms cycling, trail, and running performance into precise, actionable equations.
home.antoine_p3: At Enduraw, he contributes to building advanced tools that translate real-world effort into meaningful metrics, helping athletes understand and optimize their progression.
home.alex_p1: Dedicated to creating professional and impactful visuals, he captures the essence of Enduraw, its athletes, and its events through high-quality photography.
home.alex_p2: Whether on competitions, training sessions, or brand productions, he brings a sharp eye for detail and storytelling.
home.alex_p3: His work enhances our communication by showcasing the energy, authenticity, and performance at the heart of endurance sports.
home.readyToOptimize_p: Take your performance to the next level with data-driven insights and personalized strategies.

services.dashboard_desc: Analyze your Strava data with our advanced algorithms and get detailed insights on every run.
services.testing_desc: Complete physiological testing protocols to understand your body and optimize your training zones.
services.athleteSupport_desc: Personalized coaching and race strategy support for competitive athletes seeking peak performance.
services.performanceCenter_desc: Elite training camps in Chamonix with world-class facilities and expert coaching staff.
services.api_desc: Mathematics behind world best performances. Access our scientific models and data-driven intelligence.
services.getInTouch_p: Ready to optimize your performance? Let's discuss how data science can transform your training.

contact.title: CONTACT US
contact.subtitle: Choose the right team to help you achieve your goals. Click on an email to send us a message.
contact.performance_p: For athlete support, training camps, physiological testing, and performance optimization.
contact.dashboard_p: For questions about Enduraw Dashboard, Report, API, and Strava Integration features.
contact.communication_p: For general inquiries, partnerships, media requests, and other communications.

news.title: ENDURAW MEDIA
news.subtitle: Make data accessible and bring lisibility to our sports
news.instagram_p: Stay updated with our latest performance analyses, athlete insights, and research findings on Instagram.
news.stat1: 2000 athlete performance reports generated each day
news.stat4: Runner matrix and testing report coming soon

careers.title: CAREERS
careers.subtitle: Join Enduraw to build high-impact tools for performance analysis.
careers.jobIntro: We are looking for a hybrid profile to contribute to the design and development of a data-driven application, including data processing, visualization, data quality, and product feature implementation.
careers.resp1: Build application features on the frontend and/or backend.
careers.resp3: Contribute to data analysis and modeling.
careers.resp4: Collaborate with the product team on fast iterations.
careers.prof1: Strong background in data and software development.
careers.prof2: Hands-on experience with Python and/or TypeScript.
careers.applyClick: Click the link below to access the application form:
careers.spontIntro: Want to join the Enduraw team but don't see a position that fits your profile? Send us your spontaneous application!

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.s1_p1: This privacy policy describes how Enduraw collects, uses and protects your personal data.
privacy.s1_1: Enduraw — SAS with a capital of €1,000
privacy.s1_2: Registered office: 330 Route du Plagnolet, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc
privacy.s1_6: Data Protection Officer (DPO): Valentin Templé — contact via communication@enduraw.co (or the address above)
privacy.s1_p2: Enduraw is responsible for data processing carried out in the context of using its services and applications.
privacy.s2_intro: We only collect data necessary for the provision, improvement and security of our services.
privacy.s2_account_li1: First name, last name, email address, password (hashed), language, country.
privacy.s2_account_li2: Information relating to the subscription or user account.
privacy.s2_activity_li1: Raw data from sensors or connected applications: heart rate, heart rate variability (HRV), movement, training duration and intensity, distance, speed, altitude, GPS, sleep and recovery.
privacy.s2_activity_li2: Technical metadata from devices used (model, OS, application version).
privacy.s2_activity_note: This data may, in some cases, constitute health data within the meaning of the GDPR.
privacy.s2_extra_li1: Age, height, weight, gender, athletic performance, personal goals, fatigue or well-being status (when you provide them).
privacy.s2_extra_li2: Data from third-party connectors (e.g. Strava), only after your explicit authorisation.
privacy.s2_pacing_title: Data for pacing plans and runner matrix
privacy.s2_pacing_li1: Time goal, nutritional habits, full Strava archive.
privacy.s2_tech_li1: IP address, device identifiers, connection logs, cookies and trackers.
privacy.s2_tech_li2: Information about application usage (crash reports, anonymised statistics, navigation).
privacy.s2_support_li1: Exchanges with customer service, feedback, communication preferences or responses to optional surveys.
privacy.s3_intro: Your data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.s3_li1: Account creation and management: contract execution.
privacy.s3_li2: Collection and synchronisation of activity data: contract execution and, for health data, explicit consent.
privacy.s3_li3: Training analysis, generation of indicators and personalised recommendations: explicit consent (health data).
privacy.s3_li4: Continuous product improvement, statistics and research: Enduraw's legitimate interest, in aggregated or anonymised form.
privacy.s3_li5: Support, security and fraud prevention: legitimate interest and legal obligation.
privacy.s3_li6: Communication and prospecting (newsletters, notifications): consent or soft opt-in depending on the relationship.
privacy.s3_li7: Legal compliance: compliance with accounting, tax or security obligations imposed by law.
privacy.s3_p2: Your consent may be withdrawn at any time (see section 4).
privacy.s4_p1: For processing based on consent (in particular health data and certain cookies or marketing communications), you may withdraw it at any time, without retroactive effect, via:
privacy.s4_li1: the privacy settings of your Enduraw account;
privacy.s4_p2: Deletion or withdrawal of consent may limit certain features of our services.
privacy.s5_li1: your direct input during registration or use of our services;
privacy.s5_li2: voluntary synchronisation with third-party platforms or devices (smartwatches, sensors, applications...) after your consent;
privacy.s5_li3: automatic logs and interactions generated by using our application.
privacy.s5_p2: No data stream is collected without your explicit action or authorisation.
privacy.s6_p1: Your data is processed only by authorised Enduraw teams (product, data science, support, security) and, where applicable, by processors acting on our behalf under GDPR-compliant contracts.
privacy.s6_li3: Support and technical incident tracking tools
privacy.s6_p3: No transfer to unauthorised third parties is made without your explicit consent.
privacy.s6_p4: The updated list of our processors is available upon request at communication@enduraw.co
privacy.s7_intro: We retain your data for strictly necessary periods:
privacy.s7_li1: Account and activity data: as long as the account is active, then deletion or anonymisation within 12 months following account deletion.
privacy.s7_li2: Security and access logs: from 6 months to 2 years depending on criticality.
privacy.s7_li3: Communication or support data: 3 years after the last contact.
privacy.s7_li4: Aggregated or anonymised data: retained indefinitely.
privacy.s8_intro: Enduraw implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data:
privacy.s8_li1: Data encryption at rest and in transit (HTTPS, AES-256)
privacy.s8_li2: Storage on secure AWS US-east servers
privacy.s8_li4: Anonymisation and pseudonymisation of sensitive data
privacy.s8_li6: Encrypted backups and business continuity plan
privacy.s8_li7: Notification to authorities (CNIL) and data subjects in case of a high-risk breach
privacy.s9_intro: In accordance with the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights:
privacy.s9_li1: Right of access to your data;
privacy.s9_li2: Right of rectification of inaccurate information;
privacy.s9_li3: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten");
privacy.s9_li5: Right to object, in particular for prospecting;
privacy.s9_li6: Right to withdraw consent at any time;
privacy.s9_li7: Right to define the fate of your data after your death (post-mortem directive in France).
privacy.s9_p2: You can exercise these rights by contacting:
privacy.s9_p3: or by post to: Enduraw, 330 Route du Plagnolet, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc.
privacy.s9_p4: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL
privacy.s10_p1: Enduraw services are not intended for children under 15 (minimum age for digital consent in France).
privacy.s10_p2: If a minor under 15 uses our services, the consent of the holder of parental authority is required.
privacy.s10_p3: Any data collected without this consent will be deleted upon detection.
privacy.s11_p1: Enduraw does not carry out any automated decision-making that has legal or significant effects on users.
privacy.s11_p2: Performance indicators, scores, training recommendations and any other automatically generated content are provided for informational purposes only. They do not in any way constitute medical advice, a diagnosis or binding personalised advice.
privacy.s11_p3: The user remains entirely responsible for their choices and the application of recommendations, and must, if necessary, consult a qualified health professional before taking any action based on this information.
privacy.s11_p4: Enduraw may use certain data for analysis or profiling purposes solely to improve services, without making individual decisions with legal or financial impact on the user.
privacy.s12_p1: We may modify this privacy policy at any time to adapt to our technical, legal or organisational changes.
privacy.s12_p2: Any update will be published on this page, and a notification will be sent to users if the changes are significant.
privacy.s12_p3: We encourage users to regularly consult this page to stay informed about data protection practices.
privacy.s13_p1: For any questions about this policy or the management of your personal data:
